final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: editorial travel photo, wide landscape crop
Primary request: luxury infinity pool overlooking the ocean in a tropical resort setting
Scene/backdrop: tropical beachside hotel, infinity pool edge merging with deep blue sea horizon, open sky
Subject: infinity pool with crystal-clear turquoise water, sun loungers with white cushions, colorful beach umbrellas, tall coconut palm trees lining the pool deck
Style/medium: photorealistic travel editorial photography
Composition/framing: wide-angle shot, slight low angle, pool in foreground leading eye to ocean horizon
Lighting/mood: bright midday tropical sun, warm and inviting, vibrant and energetic holiday atmosphere
Color palette: vivid turquoise pool water, deep sapphire ocean, bright white clouds, lush tropical green palms, warm sandy beige deck, pops of coral and yellow from umbrellas
Materials/textures: smooth stone pool deck, reflective water surface with caustic light patterns, textured palm fronds, soft cushion fabric
Constraints: no people required, keep infinity edge clearly visible merging with sea horizon
Avoid: overcast sky, muted desaturated tones, cluttered composition, watermark
